title: Family & Descriptions
description: Talk about your family members and describe people.

grammar.title: Describing with 'Adalah' and Word Order
grammar.explanation: In Malay, adjectives follow nouns directly (like French/Spanish). 'Adalah' is optional for formal definitions.

examples.english: A big house / The house is big.

dialogue.speaker: John
dialogue.malay: Wah, besar keluarga awak! Siapa ini?
dialogue.english: Wow, your family is big! Who is this?

dialogue.speaker: Aminah
dialogue.malay: Ini ibu dan bapa saya. Mereka sudah tua.
dialogue.english: This is my mother and father. They are old.

dialogue.speaker: John
dialogue.english: Your older brother is very tall!

dialogue.speaker: Aminah
dialogue.malay: Ya, dia tinggi. Adik saya pula pendek.
dialogue.english: Yes, he is tall. My younger sibling however is short.

exercise.question: What is the word order for 'big house'?
